---
title: "Datasets included in BEAR"
subtitle: "Appendix"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  bookdown::pdf_document2:
    toc: true
    number_sections: false
    keep_tex: true
geometry: margin=1in
fontsize: 11pt
bibliography: references.bib
---

# GitHub repository for BEAR

BEAR is available at https://github.com/wwiecek/BEAR. For those interested in accessing data for individual datasets (which often include additional variables and structure), 

BEAR stores each processed dataset as a separate `.rds` file under `data/`;
dataset processing is carried out under `process/`. Raw source data are not
distributed with the repository, but their source, availability, and relevant
processing decisions are described below.



```{r stitch, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
dataset_files <- c(
  "datasets/ArelBundock.Rmd",
  "datasets/Askarov.Rmd",
  "datasets/BarnettWren.Rmd",
  "datasets/Bartos.Rmd",
  "datasets/Brodeur.Rmd",
  "datasets/Lang.Rmd",
  "datasets/Chavalarias.Rmd",
  "datasets/clinicaltrials_gov.Rmd",
  "datasets/Cochrane.Rmd",
  "datasets/CostelloFox_Yang.Rmd",
  "datasets/EUCTR.Rmd",
  "datasets/Head.Rmd",
  "datasets/JagerLeek.Rmd",
  "datasets/Metapsy.Rmd",
  "datasets/OSC.Rmd",
  "datasets/psymetadata_Nuijten.Rmd",
  "datasets/Sladekova.Rmd",
  "datasets/Szucs.Rmd",
  "datasets/ManyLabs2.Rmd",
  "datasets/SCORE.Rmd",
  "datasets/WWC.Rmd"
)

for (child in dataset_files) {
  cat("\n\n\\newpage\n\n")
  cat(knitr::knit_child(child, quiet = TRUE), sep = "\n")
}

cat("\n\n\\newpage\n\n")
cat(knitr::knit_child("p_value_and_ci_derivations.Rmd", quiet = TRUE), sep = "\n")
```

# References for datasets used in BEAR
